name: pm-weekly-product-pulse
description: PM tools for Slack intelligence reporting

plugins.name: pm-weekly-product-pulse
plugins.description:
Your weekly Slack intelligence report, delivered as a Canvas. Scans public channels and DMs over the past 30 days, anchored to a product you own, and posts a focused Canvas to any channel: top questions, pain points, and overall sentiment.

Set it once, get reminded automatically. First-run setup saves your product and channel as defaults, then installs a native macOS notification on a schedule of your choice. When it fires, open Claude Code and run /pm-weekly-product-pulse — your settings are applied automatically.

Gets smarter every run. After each report, give feedback in plain language: "this isn't relevant", "wrong classification", "don't include this next time". The skill saves your preferences and applies them silently on every future run.
